items.subject: Comments on today’s episode
items.body_text: Hello, I am writing today to provide some feedback on today’s episode. I’d like to correct you in regards to a statement made about the village of Clearwater, BC. You mentioned Clearwater sit at the territorial border of the Tsilcotin and the Secwepmecw nations. This is incorrect. Clearwater, located in the heart of.Simpcw Simp territory is nowhere near the Tsilquotin territory. In general that territory starts west of the Fraser river. This just as a friendly correction. In addition, I’d like t

items.body_text: You haven't wasted my time at all! Also, that sounds awful. I have seen that happen in the past with relatives doing building. I definitely would not get a family member to do it after all the stuff I have seen in this line of work! Anyways, keep me posted. items.subject: Important correction
items.body_text: Hello, Listening to today’s episode I need to send you an important and very urgent. Correction! This is in regards to the festival you mentioned. The Arts Wells festival already happened and is not upcoming as you stated. This could lead to confusion for the nonprofit and to potential podcast listeners traveling to the community. I highly suggest you double check the dates, confirm this comment is correct and update your listeners. Warm regards, Thomas Schoen 250.305.4464 tom@firstjourneytrails
